parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter on the field `title` to search for documents containing the serach term.

parameters.name: signature_status
parameters.description: Filter on the field `signatures[].status_code` with one of the valid Signature states

schema.title: Signature Status Code
schema.description:
The state of a signature.

Possible values:
  - **OPEN** Waiting for the user to sign a signature.
  - **DECLINED** The user declined to sign.
  - **WITHDRAWN** The owner has withdrawn the signature request.
  - **SIGNED** The user signed the document.
  - **ERROR** A technical error occurred.

parameters.name: status_overall
parameters.description: Filter on the field `status_overall` with one of the valid Signature states

schema.title: Signature Status Overall
schema.description:
Overall signing status of the document.

Possible values:
  - **DRAFT** The signature request has not yet been placed.
  - **OPEN** At least one user has not signed or declined their signature yet.
  - **DECLINED** At least one user declined to sign. The signature request failed.
  - **WITHDRAWN** The owner has withdrawn the signature request.
  - **SIGNED** All users signed the document. The signature request was successfully completed.
  - **ERROR** A technical error occurred. The signature request cannot be completed.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: Page number for pagination. By default pagination is disabled.
